title: Check if Strings Can be Made Equal With Operations II
titleCn: 判断通过操作能否让字符串相等 II

testcases.input: s1 = "abcdba", s2 = "cabdab" Output: true Explanation: We can apply the following operations on s1: - Choose the indices i = 0, j = 2. The resulting string is s1 = "cbadba". - Choose the indices i = 2, j = 4. The resulting string is s1 = "cbbdaa". - Choose the indices i = 1, j = 5. The resulting string is s1 = "cabdab" = s2.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can apply the following operations on s1: - Choose the indices i = 0, j = 2. The resulting string is s1 = "cbadba". - Choose the indices i = 2, j = 4. The resulting string is s1 = "cbbdaa". - Choose the indices i = 1, j = 5. The resulting string is s1 = "cabdab" = s2.

testcases.input: s1 = "abe", s2 = "bea" Output: false Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
